response.step_by_step_log: 1. The video was analyzed to identify the performer as Houshou Marine and the song as 'Bishoujo Muzai Pirates' based on on-screen text and performance. 2. A search query for '美少女無罪パイレーツ lyrics' was executed to find the complete official lyrics, including ad-libs. 3. The video was mapped to a single scene as it is a continuous live performance. 4. Metadata and lyrics were structured into the required JSON format, ensuring proper escaping and timestamping.
response.global_summary: A high-energy live performance of the song 'Bishoujo Muzai Pirates' by Houshou Marine at a concert. The video captures the entire song with the performer singing and dancing on stage, supported by a large screen displaying the lyrics and music video-style visuals.

scenes.description: Houshou Marine performs the song 'Bishoujo Muzai Pirates'. The screen shows the music video, and the audience waves red glow sticks throughout the performance.

It's not time yet
Innocent innocent, beautiful girl innocent

Still sparkling, even more dizzy

That you love me, including all the troublesome parts

It's special

The feeling of love at seventeen
I'll reach the peak, it's adult time
